title: Create Art
description: Artistic modifications have been made to Create to make it more exquisite.
body:
This is a Create style art resource package, and I have reimagined all of its item textures. You can download my official version, which only includes items. The block model is currently being created, you can download the beta version.
( The UI background in this display panel is from [Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/project/ta5dy0aA) by Reijvi. Thank you very much for his creation.)
